zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Masterson of Nantwich於1465年出生在英國爾南特維其時，他的父親Richard Masterson of Nantwich35歲，母親Ellena Bostock27歲。他於大約1488年與Lady Agnes Jodrell在英國爾沃萊斯頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1513年9月9日在英國諾圖波藍德享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Masterson of Nantwich于1465年出生在英国爾南特維其时，他的父亲Richard Masterson of Nantwich35岁，母亲Ellena Bostock27岁。他于大约1488年与Lady Agnes Jodrell在英国爾沃萊斯頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1513年9月9日在英国諾圖波藍德享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Masterson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English maister ‘master’ + -son. Compare Master .
Irish: in Ireland, this is usually the English name in 1 above. However, it was also adopted for Irish Mac an Mháighistir ‘son of the master’, also Anglicized as McMaster .

variants.name: Master
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Amar, Dhimant, Pravin, Amit, Aruna, Bhanu, Gaurang, Gopal, Haren, Jagu, Jayesh, Kalpesh.

English: occupational name from Middle English maister ‘master’ (Old French maistre). The word had a wide range of applications, and the reference in surnames may be to a schoolmaster, to the master of a farm or house, to the master of an apprentice, or to a ship's captain. In Scotland the eldest sons of barons and the uncles of lords were called Masters, but this is not primarily a Scottish surname.
German: dialect form of   Meister   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: McMaster
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Mháighistir ‘son of the master’, meaning ‘teacher’ or ‘cleric’. It could also be applied in the sense of ‘lord’ or ‘owner’. This name was sometimes Anglicized as Masterson .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Masterson of Nantwich was born in 1465, in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, his father, Richard Masterson of Nantwich, was 35 and his mother, Ellena Bostock, was 27. He married Lady Agnes Jodrell about 1488, in Worleston, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 9 September 1513, in Northumberland, England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Masterson of Nantwich est né en 1465, à Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Masterson of Nantwich, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Ellena Bostock, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Lady Agnes Jodrell environ 1488, à Worleston, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1513, à Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Masterson of Nantwich 1465 in Nantwich, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Masterson of Nantwich 35 und seine Mutter Ellena Bostock 27. Er hat um 1488 in Worleston, Cheshire, England Lady Agnes Jodrell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 9. September 1513 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Masterson of Nantwich è nato il nel 1465 nel Nantwich, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Masterson of Nantwich, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Ellena Bostock, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Lady Agnes Jodrell circa 1488, nel Worleston, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 9 settembre 1513, nel Northumberland, England, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Masterson of Nantwichが1465年にイギリスチェシュアイアナントウィチで生まれた時，父Richard Masterson of Nantwichは35歳，母Ellena Bostockは27歳であった。約1488年にイギリスチェシュアイアウオルレストンでLady Agnes Jodrellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1513年9月9日にイギリスノースウンバーランドで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Masterson of Nantwich(이)가 1465년 영국 체실르 난트위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Masterson of Nantwich(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellena Bostock(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1488년 영국 체실르 워레스턴에서 Lady Agnes Jodrell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1513년 9월 9일 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Masterson of Nantwich nasceu em 1465, em Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Masterson of Nantwich, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Ellena Bostock, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Agnes Jodrell aproximadamente 1488, em Worleston, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1513, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Masterson of Nantwich родился в 1465 г. в местности нантвич, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Masterson of Nantwich было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellena Bostock, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Agnes Jodrell около 1488 г. в местности ворльстон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 9 сентября 1513 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Masterson of Nantwich nació en 1465, en Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Masterson of Nantwich, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Ellena Bostock, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Lady Agnes Jodrell aproximadamente 1488, en Worleston, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1513, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años.
